summary: Created from MPI-75 spin-off: decision-pending rebuild candidates (1 --cache-lru 2 model-cache OOM fix, 2 /wrapper/free remote memory release, 3 future cu130 Blackwell profile). MPI-75 closed after v0.4.0 shipped.

note: Noted in brief: MPI-88 added a 3rd image profile :-cpu (slim wrapper-only, no torch/ComfyUI, own Dockerfile.cpu+start-cpu.sh+CI cpu row) for no-GPU download mode. summary: Added BUILD-READY PREFLIGHT to brief for the dispatch agent: wrapper changed (MPI-95+MPI-88) so version bump REQUIRED — current WRAPPER_VERSION 0.2.3 @ remoteProxy.js:60, image v0.4.0; recommend bump to 0.2.4 / v0.4.1 (wrapper-only=patch), match in app+mpi-ci. Listed the single-build contents (only Dockerfile work left = candidate #4 weight pre-bake; #1 cache-lru in start.sh; #5 MPI-95 + MPI-88 already committed in mpi-ci), commit-mpi-ci-before-dispatch mechanics, stale README block to refresh, and that MPI-94 has ZERO build impact. Card unblocked for an agent to execute the build.

Picked up MPI-81 rebuild batch. Code written: Dockerfile pre-bakes 5 lazy node weights (RIFE/2x upscaler/yolo-n/SAM-b, sha-verified); start.sh --cache-lru 2 OOM fix; README refreshed; app remoteProxy.js bumped v0.4.0->v0.4.1, wrapper 0.2.3->0.2.4. Building cu128 locally + cu124/-cpu via CI.

note: BUILD COMPLETE — all 3 images v0.4.1 built + pushed + PUBLIC on GHCR. cu124+cpu via CI (run 27547016694, both SUCCESS); cu128 local Docker (D: data root), smoke OK (torch 2.7.1+cu128 cuda12.8), all 5 baked weights present in image. Pre-bake VALIDATED LIVE on BOTH paths: rife47/4x_NMKD-Siax/4x-AnimeSharp/face_yolov8n/sam_vit_b all download + sha256 OK in cu124 CI log AND cu128 build. Shipped: candidate #4 weight pre-bake (Dockerfile), #1 --cache-lru 2 (start.sh), #5 MPI-95 wrapper progress, MPI-88 /health branch. wrapper 0.2.3->0.2.4, image v0.4.0->v0.4.1. App refs bumped (remoteProxy.js) commit 9a64e55 on RunPod (local, unpushed). mpi-ci fe34fea pushed. REMAINING (USER-only): redeploy a fresh Pod on v0.4.1 + live-verify (a) MPI-95 install progress (no 80% jump, Verifying at end), (b) interpolate/upscale/auto-mask no longer 503, (c) --cache-lru 2 evicts on I2V<->T2V switch + keeps Wan high+low pair + 1k-sampler unaffected. Card stays DOING until USER live-verifies. NOT shipped (deferred, no urgency): #2 /wrapper/free, #3 cu130.

LIVE TEST (user, v0.4.1 RTX PRO 6000 Pod): cu128 image booted clean (REMOTE ONLINE 96GB VRAM/283GB RAM) — image build VERIFIED good. BUT MPI-95 install progress made it WORSE: still snapped to ~80% on press + the new Verifying sweep was less helpful than the old determinate tail. Root cause = APP bug, NOT wrapper, NO rebuild: modelJob.totalBytes (denominator) was seeded once from rounded registry sizes and never re-derived from the wrapper _resolve_total per-dep real totals → real bytes outran rounded denominator → snap. Fix (app commit dc27f33, RunPod, unpushed): _onRemoteInstallEvent re-derives modelJob.totalBytes from per-dep totals every tick (kills snap) + install-verifying now re-broadcasts a DETERMINATE tick so the bar holds at real % (no sweep). Wrapper still emits the events (kept as a seam). Re-test = install a model on the SAME Pod (no redeploy). cache-lru/503 tests still pending. Card stays doing.
